rationale: The cited paper appears as a single literature-review reference in a paragraph summarizing prior empirical findings on service reliability consequences, specifically loss-gain asymmetry in perceived service quality. In the citing paper, this citation is used to establish broad background (why service reliability matters) rather than to build the focal competition model, hypotheses, measures, or identification strategy. There is no distinct follow-up discussion or methodological/conceptual borrowing from this specific study.
